researchResults.title: Daimon Robotics and Galbot jointly launches RobOmni for benchmarking tactile perception and dexterous manipulation
researchResults.description:
Embodied AI is evolving from vision-centric perception toward Physical AI.

researchResults.title: ACS raises $200M to scale autonomous counter-drone system
researchResults.description:
Allen Control Systems will use the funding to scale manufacturing and accelerate deployment of its autonomous weapon station, Bullfrog.

The post ACS raises $200M to scale autonomous counter-drone system appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Robots can enhance manufacturing workers rather than replace them
researchResults.description:
With the right AI, teleoperation, and safeguards, robotics can augment manufacturing opportunities, says one to ONE Holdings' president.

The post Robots can enhance manufacturing workers rather than replace them appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: Why deterministic real-time systems are more critical than ever in robotics
researchResults.description:
Winston Leung discusses the role of QNX role in robotics and AI, focusing on safety, innovation, and industry trends.

The post Why deterministic real-time systems are more critical than ever in robotics appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: AGIBOT holds World Challenge 2026 to see how AI models perform on real tasks
researchResults.description:
AGIBOT said the industry is moving beyond simulation scores toward closed-loop testing on real robots with real tasks.

The post AGIBOT holds World Challenge 2026 to see how AI models perform on real tasks appeared first on The Robot Report.

researchResults.title: As OpenAI files for IPO, Sam Altman’s eye-scanning company is doing layoffs, report says
researchResults.description: Tools for Humanity, Sam Altman's identity verification company, is reportedly struggling to generate revenue and will downsize its staff.

researchResults.title: OpenAI files confidentially for IPO, following Anthropic
researchResults.description: The filing comes a little more than a week after its main rival, Anthropic, also filed to go public, ramping up the race between the two AI firms.

researchResults.title: Why Apple’s slow-and-steady AI bet is starting to look pretty smart
researchResults.description: Can Apple's new AI glow up put to bed accusations that it's losing an all-important industry race?

researchResults.title: Apple’s WWDC AI demos looked more real after $250M false ad settlement
researchResults.description: The vibe of Apple's 2026 WWDC keynote felt like a spouse proudly listing all the honey-do-list items tackled. One subtle example: the many AI demos of someone standing, phone in hand.

researchResults.title: NVIDIA's CEO Projects $1 Trillion in AI Chip Sales as New Computing Era Begins
